name: reviewsense-analytics
description: ReviewSense Analytics — Unified dev launcher for FastAPI + Vite React

scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names BACKEND,FRONTEND --prefix-colors bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "wait-on http-get://localhost:8000/health && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
